## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [May performance: 84 clicks in 12 days, on track for \~200 clicks; aiming for 230-250 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [6 revamped articles + 2 new articles published; 8 new topics approved for creation](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Airtable cleaned up: 120 articles published total, backlog reorganized](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Target: Hit 250 clicks in June, ramping up content production](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Publishing

  - [6 high-priority articles revamped, 2 new articles published (concession, bid checklist, process)](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Publishing delay due to UI button visibility issue; VA couldn't find publish button](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Gus to review and publish draft changes for optimized articles](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Prateek given green light to publish future optimized content directly](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [May (12 days): 84 clicks, projecting \~200 clicks total](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Previous week: 56 clicks, 25,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Top performers: conferences (7 clicks), construction sales process (6), AI tool for innovation (5)](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Growing articles: construction sales process (+4 clicks), AI tools (+3 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Airtable cleaned up: 120 articles published, others moved to backlog](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [4 new topics added on bid/pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

  - [8 topics approved for next week, 1 topic (CRM reasons) to be reworked](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Webflow Access

  - [Prateek received help with Webflow access](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

  - [Request for direct Webflow login link to resolve button visibility problem](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Goals and Targets

  - [May target: Maintain \~200 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [June target: Push to 250 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Strategy: Increase content production and publishing frequency](https://fathom.video/share/91e1K9bTm2hok_1QqnQqWGj7myYzvYC7?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
